h1: Why Summer is the Best Time for a Fireplace Makeover

paragraphs: As the warmer months approach, thoughts of cozy evenings by the fireplace might seem out of place; however, if you've been considering a fireplace makeover, now is the perfect time. Whether you're looking to replace an old wood-burning fireplace or upgrade to a more efficient and stylish option, tackling this project during the summer months offers several advantages.
Get Set Up Early for Cold Temps

Waiting until the colder months to replace your fireplace can lead to delays due to high demand. As temperatures decrease, many homeowners begin thinking about installing or upgrading their fireplaces, resulting in increased competition for installation services. By acting early, you can avoid the rush and secure a convenient installation schedule.

The installation process itself is often faster during the summer. With more daylight hours and generally milder weather conditions, installers can work more efficiently, completing the project in less time. This means you can enjoy your new fireplace sooner and start reaping the benefits long before the chill of winter sets in.

Let's take a closer look at a real-life example of a fireplace makeover, guided by the expertise of interior designer Katie Kurtz. In this transformation, we see a total glow-up from an outdated wood-burning fireplace to a stunning, modern centerpiece with a Heat & Glo gas insert. "A gas insert gives so much more ease of use," explains Katie. "I love the option to have the flame on or just the glowing ember lights for the ambiance you want, winter or summer." With the flick of a switch, homeowners can effortlessly adjust the level of warmth and ambiance to suit any occasion, whether it's a cozy winter evening or a balmy summer night. Read more about Katie’s wood-to-gas insert transformation.
After the fireplace makeover with the Escape gas fireplace insert.

If you're ready to get more efficiency, ease of use, and beauty out of your fireplace, don't hesitate to reach out to a dealer near you, the experts in fireplace installation and renovation. With their help, you can transform your outdated fireplace into a stylish and efficient focal point for your home.Ready for your fireplace makeover, request a consultation to get started!

Transform your home with our top-of-the-line Escape gas fireplace insert. The biggest, clearest view of the fire, hand-painted logs and efficient heating take your fireplace from unused to unbelievable. Available in 30 and 35-inch widths.

With big flames and classic style, the Supreme gas fireplace insert gives your old, cold fireplace a beautiful makeover. Choose from the widest variety of logs and interior styles to get the look you love. Gathering around a roaring fire has never been easier thanks to this low-maintenance fireplace insert. Available in 25, 30 and 35-inch widths.

Match your modern design style with the Cosmo gas insert. It fits directly inside your outdated, wood-burning firebox, turning an unusable fireplace into an efficient, easy-to-use gas fire. No more hassle, only pure fireplace enjoyment. Available in 30 and 35-inch widths.

Restore the beauty and functionality of your fireplace with the Provident. This gas fireplace insert helps heat your home efficiently and provides a natural gathering space, all with the touch of a button. Available in 30 and 35-inch widths.
Browse our photo gallery to find a fireplace design that reflects your unique style.
